falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish trend would contradict the pattern's implication of a bottom, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate a confirmed blowoff top, directly opposing the bottom pattern and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: A central bank announces a rate cut of 50 basis points or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such an intervention would inject liquidity and reverse bearish momentum, disproving the pattern's expectation of a bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
